description: Socure provides identity verification, fraud prevention, and risk decisioning products. Its platforms include RiskOS for workflow-based risk evaluations and a separate DevHub for broader Socure product documentation such as ID+.
summary: Socure exposes a documented RiskOS HTTP API authenticated by Bearer API keys, plus a separate access-controlled DevHub documentation portal for ID+/other APIs; public evidence also points to an MCP integration guide, but no public MCP endpoint, GraphQL API, CLI, or public machine-readable spec URL beyond GitHub-hosted raw JSON pointers was confirmed.
